auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: HackerRank Work personal access token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Create and manage tokens from the HackerRank API settings page: https://hackerrank.com/x/settings/api.

actions.name: get_test
actions.description: Retrieve one HackerRank test by id.

items.description: An additional HackerRank field name to request in detail.

additional_fields.description: Additional HackerRank fields to request as the additional_fields query parameter.

inputSchema.description: The HackerRank test identifier and optional additional_fields list.

unique_id.description: The public candidate-facing unique identifier for the test.

name.description: The display name of the test.

state.description: The current state of the test.

starttime.description: The earliest time when candidates may log in to the test.

endtime.description: The latest time when new candidate logins are accepted.

languages.description: The languages enabled for the test, when HackerRank returns them.

items.description: A candidate detail configuration object returned by HackerRank.

candidate_details.description: The candidate detail fields configured for the test.

tags.description: The tags associated with the test.

actions.name: get_test_candidate
actions.description: Retrieve one HackerRank candidate from a specific test.

items.description: An additional HackerRank field name to request in detail.

additional_fields.description: Additional HackerRank fields to request as the additional_fields query parameter.

inputSchema.description: The identifiers required to fetch one HackerRank test candidate.

full_name.description: The full name of the candidate.

email.description: The email address of the candidate.

score.description: The raw score of the candidate, when available.

percentage_score.description: The percentage score of the candidate, when available.

anyOf.description: The integrity status summary for the candidate attempt.
The integrity summary text returned by HackerRank.

report_url.description: The report URL for the candidate.

authenticated_report_url.description: The authenticated report URL for the candidate.

pdf_url.description: The PDF report URL for the candidate.

items.description: A candidate detail item returned by HackerRank.

candidate_details.description: The custom candidate details returned for the candidate.

questions.description: The expanded questions payload, when requested.

items.description: A tag associated with the candidate.

tags.description: The tags associated with the candidate.

actions.name: list_test_candidates
actions.description: List the candidates invited to or associated with a HackerRank test.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The zero-based offset used for pagination.

inputSchema.description: The HackerRank test identifier and pagination options for listing candidates.

full_name.description: The full name of the candidate.

email.description: The email address of the candidate.

score.description: The raw score of the candidate, when available.

percentage_score.description: The percentage score of the candidate, when available.

anyOf.description: The integrity status summary for the candidate attempt.
The integrity summary text returned by HackerRank.

report_url.description: The report URL for the candidate.

authenticated_report_url.description: The authenticated report URL for the candidate.

pdf_url.description: The PDF report URL for the candidate.

items.description: A candidate detail item returned by HackerRank.

candidate_details.description: The custom candidate details returned for the candidate.

questions.description: The expanded questions payload, when requested.

items.description: A tag associated with the candidate.

tags.description: The tags associated with the candidate.

page_total.description: The number of items returned in the current page.

offset.description: The zero-based offset for the current page.

previous.description: The previous page URL returned by HackerRank.

next.description: The next page URL returned by HackerRank.

first.description: The first page URL returned by HackerRank.

last.description: The last page URL returned by HackerRank.

total.description: The total item count returned by HackerRank for the query.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by HackerRank list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The list of HackerRank test candidates plus pagination metadata.

actions.name: list_tests
actions.description: List the HackerRank tests available to the authenticated account.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The zero-based offset used for pagination.

inputSchema.description: Pagination options for listing HackerRank tests.

unique_id.description: The public candidate-facing unique identifier for the test.

name.description: The display name of the test.

state.description: The current state of the test.

starttime.description: The earliest time when candidates may log in to the test.

endtime.description: The latest time when new candidate logins are accepted.

languages.description: The languages enabled for the test, when HackerRank returns them.

items.description: A candidate detail configuration object returned by HackerRank.

candidate_details.description: The candidate detail fields configured for the test.

tags.description: The tags associated with the test.

page_total.description: The number of items returned in the current page.

offset.description: The zero-based offset for the current page.

previous.description: The previous page URL returned by HackerRank.

next.description: The next page URL returned by HackerRank.

first.description: The first page URL returned by HackerRank.

last.description: The last page URL returned by HackerRank.

total.description: The total item count returned by HackerRank for the query.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by HackerRank list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The list of HackerRank tests plus pagination metadata.

actions.name: search_test_candidates
actions.description: Search HackerRank test candidates by name or email.

search.description: The name or email text used to search candidates.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The zero-based offset used for pagination.

inputSchema.description: The search input for HackerRank test candidates.

full_name.description: The full name of the candidate.

email.description: The email address of the candidate.

score.description: The raw score of the candidate, when available.

percentage_score.description: The percentage score of the candidate, when available.

anyOf.description: The integrity status summary for the candidate attempt.
The integrity summary text returned by HackerRank.

report_url.description: The report URL for the candidate.

authenticated_report_url.description: The authenticated report URL for the candidate.

pdf_url.description: The PDF report URL for the candidate.

items.description: A candidate detail item returned by HackerRank.

candidate_details.description: The custom candidate details returned for the candidate.

questions.description: The expanded questions payload, when requested.

items.description: A tag associated with the candidate.

tags.description: The tags associated with the candidate.

candidates.description: The candidates returned by the search.

page_total.description: The number of items returned in the current page.

offset.description: The zero-based offset for the current page.

previous.description: The previous page URL returned by HackerRank.

next.description: The next page URL returned by HackerRank.

first.description: The first page URL returned by HackerRank.

last.description: The last page URL returned by HackerRank.

total.description: The total item count returned by HackerRank for the query.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata returned by HackerRank list endpoints.

outputSchema.description: The HackerRank candidate search results plus pagination metadata.
